impact: infra/src/serverless-platform-stack.ts and src/lib/observability/logging.ts: custom observability metric names are repeated across infra contracts, logging allowlist, docs, and tests; shared cross-package contract cleanup is better handled as a follow-up rather than changing package boundaries in T-042.
resolution: Moved custom observability metric namespace, metric names, and bounded dimension names into shared/observability/metrics.ts. App logging, CDK metric contracts, infra tests, and the runbook now reference that shared contract instead of maintaining independent metric allowlists.
title: [maintainability/drift-risk] infra/src/serverless-platform-stack.ts and src/lib/observability/logging.ts: cus
